eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Worth, MO; at 05:12 PM ON MAY 16, 2026 Effective until 09:12 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: TORNADO WATCH UNTIL 11 PM. Severe Thunderstorms are entering the area. These storms have produced tornados, hail, high winds, and heavy rains.  Current rotation near Benton Iowa.  Take precautions and stay tuned in to current weather reporting,
